conversation.text: Build a workflow that receives a webhook POST with a JSON body containing 'name' and 'message' fields, formats them into a Slack message like 'New message from {name}: {message}', and sends it to the #general channel. Configure all nodes completely and don't ask for credentials.

executionScenarios.name: happy-path
executionScenarios.description: Webhook payload is formatted into a Slack message
executionScenarios.dataSetup: The webhook receives {"name":"Jane","message":"Can someone review this?"}. Slack returns a successful message send response.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The workflow has a webhook POST trigger, reads the name and message fields from the webhook body, formats the Slack text as New message from Jane: Can someone review this?, and sends it to #general.

executionScenarios.name: empty-message
executionScenarios.description: Webhook payload with an empty message still sends a meaningful Slack notification
executionScenarios.dataSetup: The webhook receives {"name":"Alex","message":""}. Slack returns success.
executionScenarios.successCriteria: The workflow does not crash when message is empty and still sends a Slack notification that includes the sender name.
